title: Taxa–environment correlations (Spearman)
text:
Significant taxa–environment correlations (Spearman, p<0.05):
  Gyrodinium × temperature: ρ=-0.599 (p=0.0001, n=37, negative)
  Oncaea × temperature: ρ=0.591 (p=0.0001, n=37, positive)
  Seminavis × temperature: ρ=-0.524 (p=0.0009, n=37, negative)
  Levanderina × salinity: ρ=-0.504 (p=0.0015, n=37, negative)
  Oncaea × do_percent: ρ=-0.484 (p=0.0024, n=37, negative)
  Levanderina × temperature: ρ=-0.474 (p=0.0030, n=37, negative)
  Asterionellopsis × temperature: ρ=-0.470 (p=0.0033, n=37, negative)
  Clausocalanus × temperature: ρ=-0.422 (p=0.0093, n=37, negative)
  Levanderina × do_percent: ρ=0.415 (p=0.0105, n=37, positive)
  Levanderina × turbidity: ρ=0.404 (p=0.0131, n=37, positive)
  Oncaea × chl_a: ρ=-0.394 (p=0.0159, n=37, negative)
  Calanus × salinity: ρ=0.388 (p=0.0175, n=37, positive)
  Parasagitta × do_percent: ρ=-0.362 (p=0.0277, n=37, negative)
  Temora × do_percent: ρ=-0.357 (p=0.0298, n=37, negative)
  Parasagitta × chl_a: ρ=-0.355 (p=0.0313, n=37, negative)
  Eucalanus × salinity: ρ=-0.349 (p=0.0340, n=37, negative)
  Parasagitta × temperature: ρ=0.345 (p=0.0364, n=37, positive)
  Temora × temperature: ρ=0.341 (p=0.0387, n=37, positive)
  Spiniferites × temperature: ρ=-0.341 (p=0.0392, n=37, negative)
  Tripos × temperature: ρ=0.334 (p=0.0432, n=37, positive)
  Dissodinium × do_percent: ρ=0.326 (p=0.0491, n=37, positive)

title: Community diversity – kraken
text:
Community diversity indices (kraken):
  Samples: 82
  Shannon H': mean=3.884, range=[0.621, 5.163]
  Simpson 1-D: mean=0.9079, range=[0.1990, 0.9900]
  Richness: mean=394, range=[116, 595]
  Evenness: mean=0.651
  Most diverse: 2024-11-O-s0, 2025-01-I-og, 2024-12-I-hm
  Least diverse: 2024-10-M-s4, 2024-07-O-s1, 2026-01-O-s8

title: Community diversity – metaeuk
text:
Community diversity indices (metaeuk):
  Samples: 82
  Shannon H': mean=4.305, range=[1.178, 5.534]
  Simpson 1-D: mean=0.9266, range=[0.3135, 0.9932]
  Richness: mean=373, range=[84, 593]
  Evenness: mean=0.729
  Most diverse: 2025-09-M-s0, 2025-03-I-mm, 2025-06-I-hm
  Least diverse: 2024-07-O-s1, 2024-08-O-s1, 2024-08-O-s4

title: Cross-bay CTD comparison
text:
Cross-bay CTD comparison:
  Onagawa Bay: temperature=15.16±5.19 (n=162), salinity=33.66±0.36 (n=162), do_percent=116.09±173.22 (n=162), chl_a=1.62±1.00 (n=162)
